name: Zuoli Kechuang Micro-finance Company Limited
summary: Zuoli Kechuang Micro-finance Company Limited operates as a microfinance company in the People's Republic of China. The company offers unsecured, guaranteed, collateralized, and pledged loans; enterprise loans, including agriculture loans and technology enterprises credit loans, as well as loans for other small and medium-sized enterprises and microenterprises; individual business, start-up, and other loans; and Internet micro-loans. The company was formerly known as Deqing Zuoli Kechuang Micro-finance Company Limited and changed its name to Zuoli Kechuang Micro-Finance Company Limited in April 2014. Zuoli Kechuang Micro-finance Company Limited was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Huzhou, the People's Republic of China.
